chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 145 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 20.06.2025 Mr. Ahmed Mehran Goraya, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Ali Murad Narejo on behalf of SSP Khairpur, SIP Aijaz Ali Dahar of Police Station Akri @ Faiz Ganj and ASI Syed Asadullah Shah of Police Station Sorah..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Vakalatnama has been filed by Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate on behalf of respondents No.6 to 9, while statements have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2, 3, 4 and 5, which are taken on record. Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that due to the freewill marriage of the petitioner’s brother-in-law, namely Ali Raza with Mst. Rashida, her family members and relatives, including respondents No.6 to 9, have become annoyed and are allegedly harassing the petitioner in connivance with the police. The private respondents, who are present in Court, have categorically denied the allegations of harassment, and the official respondents have also submitted that they have neither harassed the petitioner nor do they intend to do so. In view of the above statements, the official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner. If the petitioner approach the concerned police for any lawful assistance, the same shall be addressed in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
